restriction.android:title: Settings Password
restriction.android:description: Password to access the settings page

restriction.android:title: Connection Secret
restriction.android:description: Secret code for unattended remote access

restriction.android:title: Tracking Server URL
restriction.android:description: URL of the server for location tracking

restriction.android:title: Tracking Interval (minutes)
restriction.android:description: Interval in minutes for sending location updates
